---
name: lecture-video
description: Generates a narrated Remotion video for a math lecture using edge-tts. Use when asked to create a lecture video, narrated video, or animated math video.
---

Using Remotion and edge-tts, generate a complete narrated math lecture video.

Produce:
1. A Remotion project with scenes matching the lecture content — title card, key concept slides with LaTeX, summary
2. An edge-tts narration script (plain text, one paragraph per scene, ~30 seconds each) using voice en-US-AriaNeural
3. Audio sync so each narration paragraph plays during its corresponding scene

Use 1920×1080 at 30fps, white background, dark blue text, and fade transitions.

Topic, scenes, and any timing requirements: {{input}}
